lessonTitleText: Jesus on the Road to Emmaus
lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Where were the two travelers going?

answers: Cleopas and possibly his wife Mary

questions.text: Who joined them on the road?
What did God do as Jesus walked with them?
answers: Kept the travelers from recognizing Jesus
Made them run as fast as a cheetah

questions.text: What were the travelers talking about?
answers: Jesus’ death and the empty tomb

questions.text: What did Jesus say about the Scriptures?
What did Jesus say the Messiah had to do?
What happened as they ate with Jesus?
answers: Their eyes were opened and they recognized him
They heard a voice from heaven
Jesus rose up to the clouds

questions.text: What happened after they recognized Jesus?
answers: Jesus walked with them back to Jerusalem
The travelers were scared and ran away

questions.text: What did the two travelers do after Jesus disappeared?
answers: They ran back to Jerusalem to tell the disciples
They sent a message to the disciples
